title: Sandbox – Session Core

classes.name: BaseSandboxSession
methods: async aclose() -> None [concrete: run_pre_stop_hooks → stop → shutdown → _aclose_dependencies]
async exec(*command, timeout, shell, user) -> ExecResult [concrete: delegates to _exec_internal via _prepare_exec_command]
@abc.abstractmethod async write(path: Path, data: io.IOBase, *, user) -> None
async pty_exec_start(*command, timeout, shell, user, tty, yield_time_s, max_output_tokens) -> PtyExecUpdate
async pty_write_stdin(*, session_id, chars, yield_time_s, max_output_tokens) -> PtyExecUpdate
def supports_pty() -> bool [returns False; subclasses override]
def supports_docker_volume_mounts() -> bool [returns False; Docker overrides]
async _start_workspace() -> None [snapshot restore / manifest apply logic]

classes.name: SandboxSession
classes.description: Decorator/wrapper: adds audit events and SDK tracing spans around every sandbox operation.
methods: @instrumented_op async exec(*command, timeout, shell, user) -> ExecResult
async _annotate(op, start_data, run, finish_data, ok, outputs) -> T [core: emits start/finish events + trace span]

classes.name: SandboxSessionState
classes.description: Serializable session state with discriminated union registry for subclasses.
methods: @classmethod parse(payload) -> SandboxSessionState [dispatches to registered subclass by 'type']
@classmethod __pydantic_init_subclass__(**kwargs) -> None [auto-registers every subclass by Literal 'type' default]

classes.name: DockerSandboxSession
classes.description: Docker-backed sandbox session. Runs commands inside a Docker container via exec_run.
methods: async persist_workspace() -> io.IOBase [docker copy_archive → tar stream]

classes.name: UnixLocalSandboxSession
classes.description: Unix-host sandbox: runs commands on the host OS; workspace is a temp dir on the host filesystem.
methods: async _exec_internal(*command, timeout) -> ExecResult [asyncio.create_subprocess_exec; SIGKILL process group on timeout]
async persist_workspace() -> io.IOBase [tar archive to BytesIO]
async read(path, *, user) -> io.IOBase [open file for read]
async write(path, data, *, user) -> None [write bytes to file]
async rm(path, *, recursive, user) -> None [shutil.rmtree / unlink]
async _apply_manifest(*, only_ephemeral, provision_accounts) -> MaterializationResult [raises if manifest has users/groups]
def _confined_exec_command(...) -> list[str] [macOS: wraps with sandbox-exec profile]
def _darwin_exec_profile(workspace_root, extra_read_paths) -> str [generates SBPL sandbox profile]

classes.name: UnixLocalSandboxClient
methods: async create(*, snapshot, manifest, options) -> SandboxSession [creates tempdir workspace, builds UnixLocalSandboxSessionState, wraps with SandboxSession]
async delete(session) -> SandboxSession [unmounts ephemeral mounts; shutil.rmtree if workspace_root_owned]

design_patterns: Decorator pattern: SandboxSession wraps any BaseSandboxSession to add instrumentation without modifying the inner session
Template Method pattern: BaseSandboxSession.start()/stop()/shutdown() define lifecycle hooks (_ensure_backend_started, _prepare_backend_workspace, _after_start, etc.) that subclasses override
Registry pattern: SandboxSessionState._subclass_registry allows parse() to deserialize the correct subclass by 'type' discriminator
Factory/Client pattern: UnixLocalSandboxClient.create() assembles session state + inner session + SandboxSession wrapper

key_abstractions.BaseSandboxSession: ABC defining the full sandbox session API (exec, read, write, ls, rm, mkdir, pty, persist, hydrate). Lifecycle: start → [work] → stop (persist snapshot) → shutdown (tear down backend).
key_abstractions.SandboxSession: Thin instrumentation wrapper around BaseSandboxSession. Emits SandboxSessionStartEvent/FinishEvent and optional SDK trace spans for each operation.
key_abstractions.SandboxSessionState: Pydantic model holding all serializable state needed to resume a session: session_id, manifest, snapshot, exposed_ports, fingerprint. Subclasses add backend-specific state.
key_abstractions.DockerSandboxSession: Runs all commands inside a Docker container via docker exec. Supports PTY and volume mounts.
key_abstractions.UnixLocalSandboxSession: Runs commands on the host OS using asyncio subprocesses. macOS uses sandbox-exec SBPL for confinement. Workspace is a host temp directory.
key_abstractions.UnixLocalSandboxClient: Creates/resumes/deletes UnixLocal sessions. Allocates isolated tempdir per session and cleans up on delete().

important_notes: stop() = persist/snapshot workspace only; shutdown() = tear down backend (Docker container etc.). aclose() calls both.
SandboxSession._inner is a concrete backend (Docker/UnixLocal); SandboxSession itself is what callers receive.
UnixLocalSandboxSession refuses manifest users/groups because it would affect the host OS.
macOS confinement: UnixLocalSandboxSession wraps exec commands in sandbox-exec with a SBPL profile denying broad host filesystem reads.
PTY support: both Docker and UnixLocal support PTY sessions; PTY processes are tracked in _pty_processes dict with LRU-style pruning at PTY_PROCESSES_MAX.
Snapshot fingerprinting: workspace tar SHA-256 fingerprint is cached to detect if snapshot restore can be skipped on resume.
SandboxSessionState.parse() uses the 'type' discriminator to deserialize the correct registered subclass — enabling polymorphic state serialization.
